summary: View File Proxy Feature VERIFIED - Support ticket file names now open inline in new tabs via backend proxy endpoint GET /api/v1/tickets/view-file. Download buttons still trigger file download. All 11 backend tests passed, UI tests confirmed view-btn and download-btn elements present and functional for both client and admin users.

view_file_proxy_verification.feature_description: Clicking file NAME opens inline in new tab (PDF viewer), download BUTTON saves file

backend_endpoint.security: Only allows proxying from configured Cloudinary account (ditryuycq)

frontend_changes.view_button: Button with data-testid=view-btn-{idx}-{attIdx} calls handleViewFile() which fetches via proxy
frontend_changes.download_button: Button with data-testid=download-btn-{idx}-{attIdx} fetches blob directly from Cloudinary and triggers download

backend: test_view_file_returns_pdf_content - returns PDF with inline disposition
frontend: Dashboard loads with Contact Support button - PASS
Support Tickets page shows qwe ticket - PASS
Ticket details show 2 attachments with PDF icons - PASS
Admin grouped view shows 51 clients, 100 tickets - PASS
Admin can view qwe ticket with attachments - PASS
Admin view has same view/download buttons - PASS

seed_data_creation: None - using existing test ticket 'qwe' with 2 PDF attachments
context_for_next_testing_agent: View file proxy feature verified in iteration 159. Backend endpoint GET /api/v1/tickets/view-file proxies Cloudinary files with Content-Disposition: inline to enable PDF viewing in browser. Frontend Support.js has separate view (data-testid=view-btn-*) and download (data-testid=download-btn-*) buttons. Test ticket 'qwe' (ID: 699c7eb2c8fa4bf3cfa789bb) has 2 PDF attachments for testing.
deployment_readiness: READY FOR DEPLOYMENT - View file inline feature complete and verified
